name: Fairchem Organics Limited
summary: Fairchem Organics Limited engages in manufacturing and selling of specialty oleo chemicals and intermediate nutraceuticals in India. The company offers aroma chemicals products, such as dihydromyrcenol, amber fleur, terpineol - pine oil, and OTBCHA √Ç¬ñ PTBCHA. It also provides nutraceuticals comprising mixed tocopherol and sterol concentrate; and oleo chemicals, such as dimer, linoleic, monomer, and distilled fatty acid products. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
